title: croton borhidii
intro: Croton borhidii, also known as Philippine croton, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton borhidii include reducing pain and inflammation, treating fever, and promoting wound healing. Croton borhidii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to treat various health conditions, and its leaves can also be used to make a topical application for skin conditions.
